verse.name: v1
verse.lines: See His love nailed onto a cross Perfect and blameless life given as sacrifice See Him there all in the name of love Broken yet glorious, all for the sake of us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This is Jesus in His glory King of Heaven dying for me It is finished, He has done it Death is beaten, Heaven beckons me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Greater love no one could ever show Mercy so undeserved, freedom I should not know All my sin, all of my hidden shame Died with Him on the cross, eternity won for us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: /: Such love, such love Such love is this for me :/ 3x
